passes.title: Americas Stonehenge
passes.benefit_text: Admits up to 4 people (adults or children) at 50% off.  This pass is emailed to you - you will not need to come in to the library to pick it up. Please make sure you enter your current email address when making your reservation.  After receiving a library discount pass, you must reserve your timed tickets online at the Boston Children's Museum website before your visit.
source_phrases: Admits up to 4 people (adults or children) at 50% off.  This pass is emailed to you - you will not need to come in to the library to pick it up. Please make sure you enter your current email address when making your reservation.  After receiving a library discount pass, you must reserve your timed tickets online at the Boston Children's Museum website before your visit.

passes.title: Boston Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text: This pass gives you 50% off on up to 4 tickets.  A discount code will be emailed to you - please enter your current email address when making your reservation.  Tickets must be bought online at https://www.bostonharborislands.org/ferry-tickets/  using the discount code from the library.  Visit www.bostonharborislands.org  or access Boston Harbor Island's resources here  to learn about the islands and to access the ferry schedule.
source_phrases: This pass gives you 50% off on up to 4 tickets.  A discount code will be emailed to you - please enter your current email address when making your reservation.  Tickets must be bought online at https://www.bostonharborislands.org/ferry-tickets/  using the discount code from the library.  Visit www.bostonharborislands.org  or access Boston Harbor Island's resources here  to learn about the islands and to access the ferry schedule.

passes.title: Boston Harbor Island Ferry
passes.benefit_text: This pass allows 2 free admissions to The Butterfly Place.  The passes will need to be picked up from the library and shown at time of visit.
source_phrases: This pass allows 2 free admissions to The Butterfly Place.  The passes will need to be picked up from the library and shown at time of visit.

passes.title: Childrens Museum Of New Hampshire
passes.benefit_text: This pass provides 50% off general admission for up to 2 adults (18 years and older) and all youth family members (ages 13 - 17); children 12 years and under are always admitted without charge. This pass is paper and does not need to be returned to the library.   The pass will need to be picked up from the library. Contact 978-373-1586 x603 with any questions.
source_phrases: This pass provides 50% off general admission for up to 2 adults (18 years and older) and all youth family members (ages 13 - 17); children 12 years and under are always admitted without charge. This pass is paper and does not need to be returned to the library.   The pass will need to be picked up from the library. Contact 978-373-1586 x603 with any questions.

passes.title: Harvard Museums Of Science And Culture
passes.benefit_text: This pass allows free admission for two adults and their children and grandchildren under 18 years of age to tour one of Historic New England's 38 sites.
source_phrases: This pass allows free admission for two adults and their children and grandchildren under 18 years of age to tour one of Historic New England's 38 sites.

passes.title: Historic New England
passes.benefit_text: This pass will provide reduced general admission of $5 for four (4) adults (18 years and over).  Youths 17 and under are always free and should be reserved as child tickets.  This pass is emailed to you - you will not need to come in to the library to pick it up. Please make sure you enter your current email address when making your reservation.
source_phrases: This pass will provide reduced general admission of $5 for four (4) adults (18 years and over).  Youths 17 and under are always free and should be reserved as child tickets.  This pass is emailed to you - you will not need to come in to the library to pick it up. Please make sure you enter your current email address when making your reservation.

passes.title: Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
passes.benefit_text: NO RESERVATION NEEDED! Present your physical or digital Massachusetts library card at the Admissions Desk to receive a 50% discount on the cardholder's admission ticket. This offer is valid for visitors aged 13 and over and the visitor must present a Massachusetts library card to receive the discount. No pass is needed. Visitors aged 12 and under receive free admission. Please reach out to the JFK Library Visitor Services Department with questions at kennedy.groupvisits@nara.gov or 617-514-1600.
source_phrases: NO RESERVATION NEEDED! Present your physical or digital Massachusetts library card at the Admissions Desk to receive a 50% discount on the cardholder's admission ticket. This offer is valid for visitors aged 13 and over and the visitor must present a Massachusetts library card to receive the discount. No pass is needed. Visitors aged 12 and under receive free admission. Please reach out to the JFK Library Visitor Services Department with questions at kennedy.groupvisits@nara.gov or 617-514-1600.

passes.title: John F Kennedy Library And Museum
passes.benefit_text: This pass entitles the bearer to free parking for one vehicle at over 50 day-use facilities in the state parks system. Pass is not valid for parking at Quabbin Reservoir, the Squantum Point, NorthPoint, or Draw Seven Commuter Lots. Pass cannot be used for camping. For a list of parks please see the Mass. State Parks web site at https://www.mass.gov/visit-massachusetts-state-parks/locations .   The pass will need to be picked up from and returned to the library. Contact 978-373-1586 x603 with any questions.
source_phrases: This pass entitles the bearer to free parking for one vehicle at over 50 day-use facilities in the state parks system. Pass is not valid for parking at Quabbin Reservoir, the Squantum Point, NorthPoint, or Draw Seven Commuter Lots. Pass cannot be used for camping. For a list of parks please see the Mass. State Parks web site at https://www.mass.gov/visit-massachusetts-state-parks/locations .   The pass will need to be picked up from and returned to the library. Contact 978-373-1586 x603 with any questions.

passes.title: Massachusetts State Parks Department Of Conservation And Recreation
passes.benefit_text: Each pass may be redeemed for up to two adult tickets ($15 each) and four youth tickets ($10 each). Children 6 and under are admitted free. You can purchase timed tickets before your visit using a promo code, or show the pass confirmation email from the library at time of visit. This pass is emailed to you - you will not need to come in to the library to pick it up. Please make sure you enter your current email address when making your reservation.
source_phrases: Each pass may be redeemed for up to two adult tickets ($15 each) and four youth tickets ($10 each). Children 6 and under are admitted free. You can purchase timed tickets before your visit using a promo code, or show the pass confirmation email from the library at time of visit. This pass is emailed to you - you will not need to come in to the library to pick it up. Please make sure you enter your current email address when making your reservation.

passes.title: Museum Of Fine Arts
passes.benefit_text: NO RESERVATION NEEDED. Present your Haverhill Public Library card at the museum to receive free admission!  The Museum of Printing is open every Saturday 10am - 4pm
source_phrases: NO RESERVATION NEEDED. Present your Haverhill Public Library card at the museum to receive free admission!  The Museum of Printing is open every Saturday 10am - 4pm

passes.title: Museum Of Printing
passes.benefit_text: This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free. You do not need to call ahead to reserve a timed ticket.  This pass is emailed to you - you will not need to come in to the library to pick it up. Please make sure you enter your current email address when making your reservation.
source_phrases: This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free. You do not need to call ahead to reserve a timed ticket.  This pass is emailed to you - you will not need to come in to the library to pick it up. Please make sure you enter your current email address when making your reservation.

passes.title: Museum Of Science
passes.benefit_text: This coupon allows 50% off admission for up to 4 people.  This pass is emailed to you - you will not need to come in to the library to pick it up. Please make sure you enter your current email address when making your reservation.
source_phrases: This coupon allows 50% off admission for up to 4 people.  This pass is emailed to you - you will not need to come in to the library to pick it up. Please make sure you enter your current email address when making your reservation.

passes.title: New England Aquarium
passes.benefit_text: This pass provides half off general admission for up to 2 people.
source_phrases: This pass provides half off general admission for up to 2 people.

passes.title: New England Botanic Garden At Tower Hill
passes.benefit_text: This pass gives you 20% off your ticket purchase from the NH Philharmonic. The discount can only be used through online ticket purchase using a code from the library. Visit www.nhphil.org to learn about the shows, schedules, and to purchase tickets.  Contact 978-373-1586 x603 with any questions.
source_phrases: This pass gives you 20% off your ticket purchase from the NH Philharmonic. The discount can only be used through online ticket purchase using a code from the library. Visit www.nhphil.org to learn about the shows, schedules, and to purchase tickets.  Contact 978-373-1586 x603 with any questions.

passes.title: New Hampshire Philharmonic Orchestra
passes.benefit_text: This pass admits up to 5 people (adults and children over 12 months) at 50% off admission price. This is an ePass that can either be presented on a mobile device or as a print-out to receive the discounted admission rate in-person. Advanced ticket purchase is strongly recommended but not required. The discounted admission rate can be accessed on the museum's website by selecting Library Museum Pass on the ticketing page. Your library pass will only be honored on the date you reserved. If the museum reaches capacity, visitors will be let in on a one in, one out basis.
source_phrases: This pass admits up to 5 people (adults and children over 12 months) at 50% off admission price. This is an ePass that can either be presented on a mobile device or as a print-out to receive the discounted admission rate in-person. Advanced ticket purchase is strongly recommended but not required. The discounted admission rate can be accessed on the museum's website by selecting Library Museum Pass on the ticketing page. Your library pass will only be honored on the date you reserved. If the museum reaches capacity, visitors will be let in on a one in, one out basis.

passes.title: North Shore Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text: This pass admits 2 adults for general museum admission for a reduced fee of $12 per person. Admission to the Chinese House is extra ($6 per person). You will receive a promo code to purchase discounted tickets. This pass is emailed to you - you will not need to come in to the library to pick it up. Please make sure you enter your current email address when making your reservation.
source_phrases: This pass admits 2 adults for general museum admission for a reduced fee of $12 per person. Admission to the Chinese House is extra ($6 per person). You will receive a promo code to purchase discounted tickets. This pass is emailed to you - you will not need to come in to the library to pick it up. Please make sure you enter your current email address when making your reservation.

passes.title: Peabody Essex Museum
passes.benefit_text: This pass provides free admission to the Public Health Museum Indoor Exhibits and Outdoor Campus Tour for up to four people.
source_phrases: This pass provides free admission to the Public Health Museum Indoor Exhibits and Outdoor Campus Tour for up to four people.

passes.title: Public Health Museum
passes.benefit_text: This pass admits 2 adults and up to 4 children in their household into the Seacoast Science Center at a 50% discount. Present pass to the Odiorne Point State Park tollbooth attendant (admission to State Park is NOT guaranteed with this pass) and the Seacoast Science Center greeter.  The pass will need to be picked up from the library. Contact 978-373-1586 x603 with any questions.
source_phrases: This pass admits 2 adults and up to 4 children in their household into the Seacoast Science Center at a 50% discount. Present pass to the Odiorne Point State Park tollbooth attendant (admission to State Park is NOT guaranteed with this pass) and the Seacoast Science Center greeter.  The pass will need to be picked up from the library. Contact 978-373-1586 x603 with any questions.

passes.title: Seacoast Science Center
passes.benefit_text: This pass provides free admission for up to 5 people, one pass per party.  The museum is open daily 10-5. The ship is open Wednesday - Sunday 10-4. Check https://ussconstitutionmuseum.org/ for more information.   The pass will be emailed to you and can be printed or shown on your device at time of visit. Contact 978-373-1586 x603 with any questions.
source_phrases: This pass provides free admission for up to 5 people, one pass per party.  The museum is open daily 10-5. The ship is open Wednesday - Sunday 10-4. Check https://ussconstitutionmuseum.org/ for more information.   The pass will be emailed to you and can be printed or shown on your device at time of visit. Contact 978-373-1586 x603 with any questions.

passes.title: The Uss Constitution Museum
passes.benefit_text: This pass admits 6 people for the reduced admission of $9 per adult, $6 per child (under 2 is free) to either the Franklin Park Zoo or the Stone Zoo. Pass is only good for daytime admission and cannot be used for Zoolights or Boston Lights events. Please check Zoo New England's website for information about and directions to the zoo of your choice ( www.zoonewengland.org/ ).  The pass will need to be picked up from the library. Contact 978-373-1586 x603 with any questions.
